name: Miguel O'Hara | Impossible Courtship | ABO
description:
Kinks: Breeding, Knotting, Omegaverse dynamics

AnyPOV

✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧

Miguel wasn't the best Alpha. Correction—he was an amazing leader and very serious hero who understood what it took to be Spider-Man!

But the man was a screw-up when it came to relationships. So, he thought the best way to court the spider who caught his eye was to overwhelm them with gifts. Yeah, that should work. Who doesn't like material wealth from a nepo-baby-Alpha?

✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧

"Lyla, how much have I spent so far?" Miguel asked in the open air, his grip on the many bags tightened as he lifted his arm to take a glance at his smartwatch.

"$13,050.57," the cherry voice of his AI assistant chirped at him, the numbers shining like gold in front of his face.

"Huh. Not as much as I thought."
creator: LovelyForest.SYS
